canvas.$description: Base app canvas — warm paper off-white.

canvas-subtle.$description: Soft canvas — raised cards / surfaces lifted off the paper.

canvas-muted.$description: Muted canvas — low-emphasis warm surfaces (code blocks, wells).

ink.$description: Base ink — warm near-black for body text and headings.

ink-subtle.$description: Soft ink — lower-emphasis text, captions, marginalia.

border.$description: Base hairline border for outlines, strokes, and dividers.

canvas-emphasis.$description: Emphasis app canvas color for high-prominence surfaces.

canvas-inverse.$description: Base inverse app canvas color for surfaces on dark or inverted contexts.

canvas-inverse-subtle.$description: Subtle inverse app canvas color for the least-prominent surfaces in inverse contexts.

canvas-inverse-muted.$description: Muted inverse app canvas color for low-emphasis surfaces in inverse contexts.

canvas-inverse-emphasis.$description: Emphasis inverse app canvas color for high-prominence surfaces in inverse contexts.

ink-emphasis.$description: Emphasis app ink color for high-prominence text such as headings.

ink-inverse.$description: Base inverse app ink color for body text and icons on inverse or dark canvases.

ink-inverse-subtle.$description: Subtle inverse app ink color for the least-prominent text and icons on inverse canvases.

ink-inverse-muted.$description: Muted inverse app ink color for secondary text and icons on inverse canvases.

ink-inverse-emphasis.$description: Emphasis inverse app ink color for high-prominence text on inverse canvases.
